rows.label: tev999926_SEL0031
rows.name:
This BLADE operative is
standing by for orders.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999926_MSG0101
rows.name:
There you are! I've
been waiting for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999926_MSG2001
rows.name:
I've relayed your request
for Union support![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999926_MSG2102
rows.name:
I was hoping you'd ask me to come
along. It's sooooo boooooring here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999926_MSG2103
rows.name:
But of course, your request for
Union support will be granted. You
don't need to worry about that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999926_MSG3001
rows.name:
Clearly you have a keen eye for talent.
Together, we will be unstoppable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999926_MSG3102
rows.name:
Finally, an opportunity to show
you how crazy tough I can be
when the poop hits the fan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999926_MSG5001
rows.name:
I'm in the middle of a
top-secret assignment right
now! So don't talk to me, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999926_MSG5101
rows.name:
I know it doesn't look like it, but I'm
in the middle of something right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999926_MSG5102
rows.name:
It's, like, meditation...or something? And I'm
not supposed to be interrupted. But I'll have
attained enlightenment soon, so let's talk then.[ST:wait ]
